title: phegopteris hirtirachis
intro: Phegopteris hirtirachis, also known as the hairy lip fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, specifically in China, Japan, and Korea. Traditionally, the Phegopteris hirtirachis plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Phegopteris hirtirachis include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain diseases, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In terms of herbal preparations, Phegopteris hirtirachis is often used in tea form or as a dried extract, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
